ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person for the station */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person for the station */,
  "sensor_types" TEXT /* Types of sensors installed at the station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather observation */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station that made the observation */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the observation was made */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of observation */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of observation */,
  "feels_like" REAL /* Feels-like temperature at the time of observation */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the time of observation */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the time of observation */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction at the time of observation */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure at the time of observation */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation at the time of observation */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover at the time of observation */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility at the time of observation */,
  "uv_index" REAL /* UV index at the time of observation */,
  "snow_depth" REAL /* Snow depth at the time of observation */,
  "observation_source" TEXT /* Source of the observation (e.g., sensor, manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_observations_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather forecast */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station that generated the forecast */,
  "forecast_time" TEXT /* Time the forecast was generated */,
  "forecast_weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions forecasted */,
  "forecast_temperature" REAL /* Temperature forecasted */,
  "forecast_feels_like" REAL /* Feels-like temperature forecasted */,
  "forecast_wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed forecasted */,
  "forecast_humidity" REAL /* Humidity forecasted */,
  "forecast_wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction forecasted */,
  "forecast_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure forecasted */,
  "forecast_precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation forecasted */,
  "forecast_cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover forecasted */,
  "forecast_visibility" REAL /* Visibility forecasted */,
  "forecast_uv_index" REAL /* UV index forecasted */,
  "forecast_snow_depth" REAL /* Snow depth forecasted */,
  "forecast_source" TEXT /* Source of the forecast (e.g., model A, model B) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_warnings" (
  "warning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather warning */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station that generated the warning */,
  "warning_time" TEXT /* Time the warning was generated */,
  "warning_type" TEXT /* Type of weather warning */,
  "warning_description" TEXT /* Description of the weather warning */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the warning (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "valid_until" TEXT /* Time until the warning is valid */,
  "affected_areas" TEXT /* Areas affected by the warning */,
  "recommended_actions" TEXT /* Recommended actions to take during the warning */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_warnings_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the user accessed the system */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_station_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station */,
  "status_time" TEXT /* Time the status was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the weather station (e.g., online, offline) */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status update */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator who updated the status */,
  "operator_email" TEXT /* Email of the operator who updated the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_station_status_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_station_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata update */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station */,
  "metadata_time" TEXT /* Time the metadata was updated */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Metadata for the weather station (e.g., sensor configuration) */,
  "sensor_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the sensors */,
  "sensor_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last sensor calibration */,
  "metadata_source" TEXT /* Source of the metadata (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_station_metadata_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "setting_type" TEXT /* Type of the setting (e.g., string, integer, boolean) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
